title: acanthopanax henryi
intro: Acanthopanax henryi, also known as Chinese thorowax or Henry's Acanthopanax, is a type of shrub native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body to resist stress and promote balance, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acanthopanax henryi include reducing fatigue and improving physical endurance, as well as supporting immune function and reducing inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, Acanthopanax henryi is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
